metadata.description: Zero-copy Obsidian vault over your ~/.claude/ knowledge base via symlinks. One command to make all of Claude's memory, rules, skills, agents, contexts, and plans browsable in Obsidian — no duplication, no sync.

plugins.name: obsidian-bridge
